evidence_paragraphs.snippet: [Galazza Galare](wiki:Galazza_Galare), the [Green Grace](wiki:Green_Grace), appears before [Daenerys](wiki:Daenerys_Targaryen) to offer once more the suggestion that she marry. She suggests as a...
